title: Atsushi Nishigori
wikitext:
'''Atsushi Nishigori''' (錦織 敦史), born on 14 September 1974, is a male Japanese animator, director, character designer and illustrator.

[[File:Nishigori.png|thumb|150px|Atsushi Nishigori]]

==Works==

====Theatrical Films====
*''Gunbuster vs Diebuster Aim for the Top! The GATTAI!! Movie'' (2006) - Unit Director, Animation Director, Key Animation
*''[[Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance]]'' (2009) - Storyboard, Assistant Animation Director, Key Animation
*''[[Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo]]'' (2012) - Key Animation
*''THE IDOLM@STER MOVIE: Beyond the Brilliant Future!'' (2014) - Director, Screenplay, Storyboard, Unit Director, Character Design, Chief Animation Director, Animation Director, Key Animation
*''[[Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time]]'' (2021) -  Character Design, Chief Animation Director, Digital Animation Retouch, Key Animation

====TV Anime/OVA====
*''FLCL'' (2000) - In-Between Animation
*''Gunbuster 2: Diebuster'' (2004) - Episode Director (ep 5), Assistant Animation Director (ep 1), Character Animation Director (eps 2, 5), Key Animation (eps 1-5)
*'' Tengen Toppa Gurren Lagann'' (2007) - Character Design, Animation Director (OP 1-2; 4 episodes), Assistant Animation Director (ep 20), Eyecatch Illustration (4 episodes), Key Animation (eps 1, 17, 27), Layout Supervisor (eps 11, 25)
*''Panty & Stocking with Garterbelt'' (2010) - Script (3 episodes), Storyboard (4 episodes), Episode Director (ep 22), Character Design, Animation Director (OP; eps 1, 11), Key Animation (4 episodes)
*''The IDOLM@STER'' (2011) - Director, Series Composition, Script (eps 1, 25), Storyboard (OP 1-2, ED for ep. 3, 5-7, 9-10, 17; eps 1, 13, 25), Episode Director (ep 1), Unit Director (OP 1-2, ED for ep. 3, 5-7, 9-10, 17), Character Design, Animation Director (OP 1-2; ep 25), Assistant Animation Director (ep 13), Key Animation (OP 2, ED for ep. 7, 13, 17; ep 25), Layout (ED for ep. 3, 6-7, 9-10, 13, 17)
*''DARLING in the FRANXX'' (2018) -  Director, Series Composition, Screenplay (eps 1, 24), Storyboard (OP 1-2; ED 2; eps 1, 15, 24), Episode Director (eps 1, 24), Unit Director (OP 2; ED 2), Animation Director (ep 24), Key Animation (OP 2; eps 15, 24)

==External Links==
*[https://www.animenewsnetwork.com/encyclopedia/people.php?id=12568 Atsushi Nishigori] at the Anime News Network
*[https://twitter.com/GoLi_PPP Atsushi Nishigori Twitter Profile]

{{Staff}}
html:
Atsushi Nishigori (錦織 敦史), born on 14 September 1974, is a male Japanese animator, director, character designer and illustrator.

Contents

  • 1 Works
    • 1.1 Theatrical Films
    • 1.2 TV Anime/OVA
  • 2 External Links

Works[edit]

Theatrical Films[edit]

  • Gunbuster vs Diebuster Aim for the Top! The GATTAI!! Movie (2006) - Unit Director, Animation Director, Key Animation
  • Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance (2009) - Storyboard, Assistant Animation Director, Key Animation
  • Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo (2012) - Key Animation
  • THE IDOLM@STER MOVIE: Beyond the Brilliant Future! (2014) - Director, Screenplay, Storyboard, Unit Director, Character Design, Chief Animation Director, Animation Director, Key Animation
  • Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time (2021) - Character Design, Chief Animation Director, Digital Animation Retouch, Key Animation

TV Anime/OVA[edit]

  • FLCL (2000) - In-Between Animation
  • Gunbuster 2: Diebuster (2004) - Episode Director (ep 5), Assistant Animation Director (ep 1), Character Animation Director (eps 2, 5), Key Animation (eps 1-5)
  • Tengen Toppa Gurren Lagann (2007) - Character Design, Animation Director (OP 1-2; 4 episodes), Assistant Animation Director (ep 20), Eyecatch Illustration (4 episodes), Key Animation (eps 1, 17, 27), Layout Supervisor (eps 11, 25)
  • Panty & Stocking with Garterbelt (2010) - Script (3 episodes), Storyboard (4 episodes), Episode Director (ep 22), Character Design, Animation Director (OP; eps 1, 11), Key Animation (4 episodes)
  • The IDOLM@STER (2011) - Director, Series Composition, Script (eps 1, 25), Storyboard (OP 1-2, ED for ep. 3, 5-7, 9-10, 17; eps 1, 13, 25), Episode Director (ep 1), Unit Director (OP 1-2, ED for ep. 3, 5-7, 9-10, 17), Character Design, Animation Director (OP 1-2; ep 25), Assistant Animation Director (ep 13), Key Animation (OP 2, ED for ep. 7, 13, 17; ep 25), Layout (ED for ep. 3, 6-7, 9-10, 13, 17)
  • DARLING in the FRANXX (2018) - Director, Series Composition, Screenplay (eps 1, 24), Storyboard (OP 1-2; ED 2; eps 1, 15, 24), Episode Director (eps 1, 24), Unit Director (OP 2; ED 2), Animation Director (ep 24), Key Animation (OP 2; eps 15, 24)
